title: quercus ilex var. brevicupulata
intro: Quercus ilex var. brevicupulata, also known as the brief cupped Holm oak or brief cupped Evergreen oak, is a variety of the Holm oak plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. brevicupulata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. This plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
